rule_metadata.name: hacktool_multi_jtesta_ssh_mitm
rule_metadata.description: intercepts ssh connections to capture credentials
rule_metadata.author: @fusionrace

rules.rule_text:
rule hacktool_multi_jtesta_ssh_mitm
{
	meta:
		description = "intercepts ssh connections to capture credentials"
		reference = "https://github.com/jtesta/ssh-mitm"
		author = "@fusionrace"

	strings:
		$a1 = "INTERCEPTED PASSWORD:" wide ascii
		$a2 = "more sshbuf problems." wide ascii

	condition:
		all of ( $a* )
}
